Verifies issue creation for a `Connection-Allowlist` header with an invalid URL pattern.
Issue reported: {
    issue : {
        code : ConnectionAllowlistIssue
        details : {
            connectionAllowlistIssueDetails : {
                error : InvalidUrlPattern
                request : {
                    requestId : <string>
                    url : https://devtools.test:8443/inspector-protocol/resources/connection-allowlist-test.php?enforced=(%22%2F(%5C%5Cd%2B)%2F%22)
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
